size.description: The current size of the cache.

max_size.description: The limit on the maximum size of the cache specified in the configuration.

cold.description: A boolean value indicating whether the “cache loader” process is still loading data from disk into the cache.

responses.description: The total number of valid responses read from the cache.

bytes.description: The total number of bytes read from the cache.

responses.description: The total number of expired responses read from the cache (see proxy_cache_use_stale and other “*_cache_use_stale” directives).

bytes.description: The total number of bytes read from the cache.

responses.description: The total number of expired responses read from the cache while responses were being updated (see proxy_cache_use_stale and other “*_cache_use_stale” directives).

bytes.description: The total number of bytes read from the cache.

responses.description: The total number of expired and revalidated responses read from the cache (see proxy_cache_revalidate and other “*_cache_revalidate” directives.

bytes.description: The total number of bytes read from the cache.

responses.description: The total number of responses not found in the cache.

bytes.description: The total number of bytes read from the proxied server.

responses_written.description: The total number of responses written to the cache.

bytes_written.description: The total number of bytes written to the cache.

responses.description: The total number of expired responses not taken from the cache.

bytes.description: The total number of bytes read from the proxied server.

responses_written.description: The total number of responses written to the cache.

bytes_written.description: The total number of bytes written to the cache.

responses.description: The total number of responses not looked up in the cache due to the proxy_cache_bypass and other “*_cache_bypass” directives.

bytes.description: The total number of bytes read from the proxied server.

responses_written.description: The total number of responses written to the cache.

bytes_written.description: The total number of bytes written to the cache.
